# Theoria — Scene Systems

> Interactive demonstrations of typed, composable libraries for scientific computing, optimization, and language model programming built with Effect.

## Packages

- effect-math: Foundational numerics, linear algebra, statistics, and optimization for Effect
- effect-search: Effect-native black-box optimization for TypeScript
- effect-dsp: Effect-native DSPy — programming, not prompting, language models
- effect-text: Effect-native text preparation, measurement, and greedy multiline layout

## Links

- Home: https://theoria.scenesystems.io
- Source: https://github.com/scenesystems/theoria
- Organization: https://scenesystems.io
